title: In Rural Ukraine, Basic Health Care Is a Casualty of War
summary_full: Elderly people in isolated villages are going without medicine. One woman said she hadn’t seen a doctor in four years.
summary_public: Elderly people in isolated villages are going without medicine. One woman said she hadn’t seen a doctor in four years.

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: In Rural Ukraine, Basic Health Care Is a Casualty of War
